hero.name: Ronan Chenu
hero.availability: Available for CDI / CDD / Remote, Freelance

about.title: About
about.description:
React, Next.js, Node.js and TypeScript developer focused on building modern, performant and maintainable web interfaces.
I mainly contribute on front-end topics, with strong attention to execution quality, journey clarity and product consistency.

My work is grounded in real projects designed to solve concrete needs and create visible impact for both users and the business.
Outside of development, I stay curious through sports, music and creative environments.

profile.heading: A fast, structured and product-minded contribution
profile.intro: I contribute best in environments where an interface needs to be designed, structured and pushed forward with high standards, while keeping business needs and product priorities clearly in view.

screens.title: Interfaces & flows
screens.desc: Designing clear, well-structured screens that make journeys easier to understand and smoother to use across desktop and mobile.

components.title: UI systems & components
components.desc: Setting up reusable components, a consistent UI foundation and simple conventions to speed up delivery without lowering quality.

backend.title: Front-end / API integration
backend.desc: Connecting interfaces to APIs and real use cases, with a clear and pragmatic Node.js layer when the project needs it.

finish.title: Execution quality
finish.desc: Finishing the details that strengthen product perception: responsive behavior, accessibility, performance, reading comfort and visual consistency.

method.heading: A clear, reliable and delivery-focused approach

understand.title: Frame the need
understand.desc: Clarify the problem to solve, the users involved and the functional priorities so the work starts on the right foundation.

usage.title: Clarify the experience
usage.desc: Shape information hierarchy, reading rhythm and interactions so the product feels more intuitive and efficient to use.

foundation.title: Build a solid foundation
foundation.desc: Create a clean front-end structure, useful components and readable technical integration that support long-term product evolution.

finish.title: Deliver with care
finish.desc: Validate the details that matter in production: responsive behavior, keyboard support, performance, visual consistency and robust integration.
